items.summary: AFTER a strong World Cup for Norway, Erling Haaland is quite rightly enjoying himself. items.title: World Cup final will see Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal face off for first time ever 19 years after viral baby pic
items.summary: SOME stories are simply too unbelievable to make up. Nineteen years ago, a fresh-faced Lionel Messi cradled and bathed a six-month-old baby during a charity photoshoot for a Barcelona and UNICEF calendar.
